description_long: This banner features large, bold, three-dimensional letters spelling out the word 'TEST' in a light blue color. The letters are blocky and have a uniform thickness, giving the banner a solid and substantial appearance. The surface of the letters appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a plastic or painted finish. There are no visible mounting structures, poles, or frames attached to the banner, and the letters seem to be freestanding or possibly designed for digital display. The reverse side of the banner shows the mirrored text, indicating the letters are solid and not hollow. The overall design is simple, modern, and attention-grabbing, suitable for temporary or promotional use in urban environments.
description: A bold, light blue banner spelling 'TEST' in large, blocky, three-dimensional letters with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The design is simple and modern, with no visible support structures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the word 'TEST' in large, blue, blocky letters with a smooth surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin, uniform thickness of the letters, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the mirrored 'TEST' text, confirming the letters are solid and three-dimensional.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the thin profile of the letters.
